title: Crunchy Raw-Friendly Australian Shiitake Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: An earthy and crunchy weeknight dish featuring raw-friendly Australian shiitake mushrooms, seasoned with traditional bhuna spices for a delightful flavor combination.

ingredients.name: bhuna spices mix (tomato paste, chili powder, cumin, coriander seeds, turmeric)

instructions: Clean and thinly slice the shiitake mushrooms. Finely chop the onion and mince the garlic and ginger.
Heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms, cook until they turn golden brown.
Add finely chopped onions to the pan and sauté for 2-3 minutes. Stir in minced garlic and ginger with a pinch of salt.
Stir in the bhuna spices mix and continue to stir-fry for another minute until fragrant.
Transfer the mixture to a plate, leaving any excess oil in the pan. Serve immediately as a raw-friendly meal or as part of a larger dish.
